segment.source: An interactive tab group of two to six panels: short tab labels in a bar, each panel pairing a content title and rich-text copy with an optional image. Use it for: document sections that describe several related capabilities, modules, or product areas one by one, or audience- and use-case-specific variants of one topic. Prefer 'Tabbed Content Panels' for text-only panels; 'Accordion Feature Section' when rows should collapse beside one image.
